Name: Measures must start with '.'
Description: All measures should be prefixed with '.' for easy identification in field lists.

Name: Measures must be in a display folder
Description: Measures must not sit in the root of a table — assign a display folder.

Name: Visible columns must be in a display folder
Description: Non-hidden columns should be organised into display folders.

Name: Calculation group tables must start with 'CG'
Description: Calculation group tables should be prefixed with 'CG' for discoverability.
Expression: ObjectType == ObjectType.Table && (bool)GetAnnotation("TabularEditor_InPerspective") == false && DataCategory == "Time" ? false : (bool)(this is CalculationGroupTable) && !Name.StartsWith("CG")

Name: Measures should have a description
Description: Every measure should include a description explaining what it calculates.

Name: Tables should have a description
Description: Every table should include a description.

Name: Visible columns should have a description
Description: Non-hidden columns should include a description.

Name: Do not use floating point data types
Description: Floating point columns (Double/Single) can cause rounding errors. Prefer Decimal.

Name: Foreign key columns should be hidden
Description: Columns used only for relationships should be hidden from report view.

Name: Remove unused columns
Description: Columns that are not referenced by any measure, relationship, or hierarchy waste memory.

Name: Measures should have a format string
Description: All measures should declare an explicit format string.

Name: Numeric columns should not be summarised by default
Description: Set SummarizeBy to None on numeric columns that are not intended to be aggregated directly.
